## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss Atlas workflow issues and improvements for content managers.](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New assignment generation workflow coming soon with agentic approach](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Company context can include detailed product info; structure is key](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
  - [Custom workflows can be built to address recurring issues](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Known issues: bullet point generation, AI shortcut application](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)

## Topics

### Keyword Selection and Competitor Keywords

  - [Competitor keywords occasionally appear due to SERP analysis](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Not a major issue unless explicitly forbidden by client](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [New assignment generation workflow coming soon may address this](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Article Direction and Outline Generation

  - [Generally working well, but occasional generic outlines still occur](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [File a ticket if article directions are consistently ignored](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [New agentic assignment generation process in development](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Fact Domain Checking

  - [Only accepts top-level domains, not specific URLs](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Can include up to 10 domains for fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [For non-public knowledge bases, consider using Cloud projects temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)

### Context Engineering and Product Information

  - [Company context can include detailed product descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Well-structured, clear context is crucial for effective use](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [For extensive feature lists, custom style adapter workflows can be created](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)

### Custom Workflows for Specific Clients

  - [Example: Biologica's mention review workflow](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Injects brand mentions and specific ingredients into articles](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Demonstrates ability to adapt articles post-generation](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)

### Current Issues and Upcoming Fixes

  - [Bullet point generation currently limited; fix coming with new workflow](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [AI shortcut application not working properly for some users](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Article generation workflow being rebuilt with agentic approach](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)

## Next Steps

  - [File tickets for persistent issues affecting workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1808.0)
  - [Check for existing ticket on refresh requirement for tasks](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Create ticket for AI shortcut application issue](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [Wait for upcoming assignment and article generation workflow updates](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)
  - [Continue using company context for product info, structure clearly](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Consider custom workflows for clients with specific, recurring needs](https://fathom.video/share/A-KJ5ShTpf7LxTxNU57ybo9hzHUH5-E4?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
